title: nageia mannii var. dawei
intro: Nageia mannii var. dawei, also known as Dawe's nageia, is a variety of the Nageia mannii tree, a species of coniferous evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of West Africa. The medicinal properties of Dawe's nageia include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Dawe's nageia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, Dawe's nageia is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to skin conditions and digestive issues.
